nodes.label: ADR-003: TE hinge clearance & nose-tangency fail-fast validation
nodes.rationale: Config-time validation rejects hinge/twist combinations whose mean-radius nose-tangency error exceeds NOSE_TANGENCY_MAX_DEG rather than silently degrading the shape; guarantees the declared radial deflection clearance (e.g. 5mm) holds at every control-surface angle by construction, including anti-unporting overlap at deflection extremes; the nose-curvature diagnostic (angle between consecutive nose-profile segments) is the exact tool that caught a prior two-arc/Hermite-blend curvature lumpiness defect.
nodes.norm_label: adr-003: te hinge clearance & nose-tangency fail-fast validation

nodes.label: ADR-004: LE droop dropped from scope
nodes.rationale: Leading-edge droop control device removed from project scope; edge/invalid device configs now use single-segment or te_surface-only setups to exercise segment-containment and hinge-containment rules that used to also cover LE droop.
nodes.norm_label: adr-004: le droop dropped from scope

nodes.label: tools/viewer/index_template.html
nodes.rationale: Deliberately single-theme (dark) regardless of OS light/dark preference: a CAD viewport (Fusion/Blender/SolidWorks-style) is conventionally dark, so the diagnostic viewer mirrors that vernacular rather than half-heartedly reskinning a throwaway tool.
